---
id: data-dictionary-pipeline
title: "Data Dictionary: Pipeline State"
sidebar_label: "📖 Data Dictionary"
---

import { MetaBlock, InfoPanel } from '@site/src/components/PageLayouts';
import { DataDictionary } from '@site/src/components/PageLayouts/wave3';

<MetaBlock owner="Varun Pritham" team="AI Platform" status="live" lastUpdated="2026-06-01"
  tags={['data-dictionary','data-governance','pipeline','bcbs239']} />

<InfoPanel type="note" title="Search and filter available">
  Use the search box to find fields by name or description. Toggle PII Only to see fields requiring data protection controls.
</InfoPanel>

<DataDictionary
  domain="DocSlide AI"
  entity="PipelineState"
  version="1.2.0"
  steward="Varun Pritham"
  description="Canonical field definitions for the LangGraph PipelineState TypedDict — the shared blackboard passed between all 18 agents."
  fields={[
    { name: 'source_path', type: 'string', description: 'Absolute path to the source MDX file on disk.', example: '/app/docs-site/docs/intro.mdx', nullable: false },
    { name: 'output_dir',  type: 'string', description: 'Directory where generated slides and assets are written.', example: 'output/slides/', nullable: false },
    { name: 'raw_content', type: 'string', description: 'Raw file content as returned by read_file(). Includes MDX imports and JSX.', nullable: false },
    { name: 'cleaned_content', type: 'string', description: 'MDX content after stripping imports, JSX components, and converting admonitions.', nullable: false },
    { name: 'headings',    type: 'array',  description: 'List of heading objects extracted from cleaned_content.', example: '[{"level":2,"text":"Overview","position":5}]', nullable: false },
    { name: 'code_blocks', type: 'array',  description: 'List of fenced code block objects with language and line count.', nullable: false },
    { name: 'chunks',      type: 'array',  description: 'Content chunks produced by ContentChunker — one per heading section.', nullable: false },
    { name: 'slides',      type: 'array',  description: 'Slide objects produced by LayoutSelector and refined by design agents.', nullable: false },
    { name: 'attachments', type: 'array',  description: 'Resolved attachment objects: image refs with local paths and broken status.', nullable: false },
    { name: 'output_path', type: 'string', description: 'Absolute path to the final generated slides.md file.', example: '/app/output/slides/intro.md', nullable: true },
    { name: 'pacing_report', type: 'object', description: 'Timing report from PacingAgent: total seconds, over-dense slides, over-time flag.', nullable: true },
    { name: 'validation_errors', type: 'array', description: 'List of error strings from ValidatorAgent. Empty list = valid output.', nullable: false, tags: ['audit'] },
    { name: 'file_metadata', type: 'object', description: 'File stats from os.stat(): filename, size_bytes, abs_path.', nullable: false },
    { name: 'base_directory', type: 'string', description: 'Absolute directory of the source file. Used to resolve relative attachment paths.', nullable: false },
    { name: 'frontmatter',  type: 'string', description: 'Rendered Slidev YAML frontmatter block including theme, transition, and duration.', nullable: true },
    { name: 'summary_slide', type: 'string', description: 'Rendered key-takeaways closing slide generated by SummarySlideAgent.', nullable: true },
  ]}
/>
